title: AN ACT DECLARING JULY 4 OP EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF CADIZ, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS CHARTER DAY ANNIVERSARY

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, November 19, 2018; 114 OG No. 49, 8162 (December 3, 2018)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11128, November 08, 2018 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JULY 4 OP EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF CADIZ, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS CHARTER DAY ANNIVERSARY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the

Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. July 4 of every year is hereby declared a special nonworkmg holiday in the City of Cadiz. Province of Negros Occidental, in commemoration of its charter day anniversary.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 28, 2017 and September 17, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 08 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
